text:
Results of yesterday’s CS:GO Major Stage 2 BO1 matches.

Share your predictions in the comments — how many did you get correctly?

There will be as many as 16 matches today🤯

I’ll share my thoughts on all matches, but it’s important to keep in mind that today is the 2nd stage Major and all matches will be Bo1. DYOR
Most of these teams haven’t played at the Major yet, and I plan to place almost all of my bets live

1.MOUZ - PARIVISION - 12:00  UTC
https://t.co/Mq7Y9kK3Vv
The favorite of course MOUZ. I’ll place limit orders 40–50% on MOUZ and 10% on PARIVISION

2.Imperial - TheMongolz - 12:00  UTC
https://t.co/zBCaVpRoMk
TheMongolz are the favorite, but in my opinion Imperial are the better team. I’ll bet on Imperial

3.Spirit - Liquid - 13:00  UTC
https://t.co/wzPS0NlJJw
Team Spirit are the favorite, but Liquid won Astralis 2:0 and Liquid in very good form. I’ll place limit orders of 10% on Liquid and 40–50% on Spirit.

4.Passion UA - G2 - 13:00  UTC
https://t.co/AAp74Jdjrh
The favorite of course G2,but this team is not stable, and I like the current form of Passion UA,30% on Passion UA
